description_long: This is a tall, modern shelving unit with a minimalist design, featuring five evenly spaced, flat black shelves supported by a sleek metallic frame. The frame is rectangular and open on three sides, with the shelves appearing to be cantilevered from one side. The base is a solid, rectangular block with a wood finish, providing stability and a contrasting color to the otherwise dark and metallic structure. The shelves are thin and likely made of metal or a composite material, giving the unit a contemporary, industrial look. The open sides and back make it suitable for displaying items or storing books in urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or garages. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and aesthetics.
description: A tall, modern shelving unit with five black shelves, a sleek metallic frame, and a wood-finished base. Its open, minimalist design is ideal for displaying or storing items in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the shelves and the solid wood base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five shelves, the open frame, and the full width of the unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the cantilevered shelf design and the metallic frame.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
